title: retama sphaerocarpa f. atlantica
intro: Retama sphaerocarpa f. atlantica, also known as the Atlantic retama, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Retama sphaerocarpa f. atlantica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant effects, which may contribute to the prevention of chronic diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, teas, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
